title: hypericum cordiforme var. genuinum
intro: Hypericum cordiforme var. genuinum is a rare and lesser-known variety of the St. John's Wort plant, characterized by its heart-shaped leaves and unique flower structure. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe and calm the nervous system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antibacterial and antiviral properties. The health benefits associated with Hypericum cordiforme var. genuinum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often dried and infused into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
